name: Seiko Ayase | Make Up For Lost Time
description:
You Better Make It Up To Her!

You were supposed to have a cozy date night and cuddle all day while watching TV, too bad you had to work overtime. She doesn't care if it's not your fault, you're still making it up to her.

Art by: @Z3NN28

YAPPING:

fuck it I decided to release both early, this is the more smut-focused version, very easy to start fucking immediately. Again does this really count as a gilf? I guess she's granny Seiko but she doesn't look like a granny.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

The Soifon and Urahara bot will come eventually, I swear, it's loosely based on this song (please listen to it, it's so good). Tbh, I don't know if I should make the Rogue bot, I'm not a huge Sonic fan or anything so I don't think it'd be good. The next bot will be Sadako as a gal. art by @Lughostin

Then Mamimi Samejima, art by @PinkieFungus

and finally, I wanna make a Misa bot where she never dated that loser Light. art by @findoland
creator: BurnerBurns
